enonce.texte:
Read the dialogue below and answer the questions that follow.

Dialogue: Introducing Others

Marie: Hello! This is my friend, John.

Paul: Hi, John. Nice to meet you!

John: Nice to meet you too, Paul.

Marie: John is from Douala. He is a student.

Paul: Really? I am from Yaoundé. What is your favourite subject?

John: My favourite subject is English.

Marie: His favourite subject is English. He is very good at it!
images: Two boys and one girl shaking hands and smiling, representing the characters Marie, John, and Paul.

questions.texte: Identify who is being introduced in the dialogue.
questions.reponse: John is being introduced. Marie says 'This is my friend, John.'

questions.texte: Explain what information Marie gives about John.
questions.reponse: Marie gives John's name, where he is from (Douala), his occupation (student), and his favourite subject (English).

questions.texte: Analyze the possessive adjectives used in the dialogue and identify who they refer to.
questions.reponse: 'My' refers to Marie (My friend). 'His' refers to John (His favourite subject). 'I am' and 'I' refer to Paul.

enonce.texte: Complete the sentences with the correct possessive adjective: my, your, his, her.

questions.texte: This is Marie. _______ favourite colour is blue.
My brother is a student. _______ name is James.
I have a sister. _______ name is Sarah.
This is my mother. _______ name is Grace.
I like reading. _______ favourite book is 'The Lion King'.

enonce.texte:
You are at a school event. Your friend from another class is with you. Your teacher approaches and wants to meet your friend. Write a short dialogue (6-8 exchanges) where you introduce your friend to your teacher.

Use the following expressions:

  • This is my friend...
  • He/She is from...
  • He/She is a...
  • His/Her favourite subject is...
images: A classroom scene with a teacher and two students smiling and shaking hands.

questions.reponse: Example answer: Student: Good morning, Teacher. This is my friend, David. Teacher: Good morning, David. Nice to meet you. David: Nice to meet you too, Teacher. Teacher: Where are you from, David? David: I am from Bafoussam. Student: His favourite subject is Science. Teacher: That's wonderful! Do you like Science, David? David: Yes, I do. It is very interesting.

enonce.texte:
You have a new student in your class. Write a short paragraph (4-5 sentences) to introduce this new student to the class. Include:

  • The student's name
  • Where he/she is from
  • His/her age
  • His/her favourite subject
  • Use at least three possessive adjectives
images: A new student standing in front of a classroom, smiling and waving.

questions.reponse:
Example answer:

"Hello everyone! This is my new friend, Amina. Her name is Amina. She is from Garoua. Her age is 11 years old. Her favourite subject is English because she loves reading stories. She is a very kind person. I think her smile is beautiful. Let's all welcome her to our class!"

enonce.texte:
Read the text below and answer the questions.

Text: My Family

My name is Sarah. I am 10 years old. This is my mother. Her name is Linda. She is a teacher. This is my father. His name is Peter. He is a doctor. I have a brother. His name is Tom. He is 7 years old. My family is happy. I love my family.
images: A simple family picture with a mother, father, and two children smiling together.

questions.texte: Identify the members of Sarah's family mentioned in the text.
questions.reponse: Sarah's family members mentioned are: her mother (Linda), her father (Peter), and her brother (Tom).

questions.texte: Explain what Sarah's mother and father do for work.
questions.reponse: Sarah's mother is a teacher and her father is a doctor.

questions.texte: Analyze the possessive adjectives used in the text and identify who they refer to.
questions.reponse: 'My' refers to Sarah (My name, My mother, My father, My brother, My family). 'Her' refers to Sarah's mother (Her name is Linda). 'His' refers to Sarah's father (His name is Peter) and Sarah's brother (His name is Tom).

enonce.texte:
You are a journalist for your school newspaper. You need to interview a new student and write a short article introducing him/her. Write 5 questions to ask the student and then write the answers based on the information below.

Student Information:

  • Name: Michael
  • Age: 11
  • From: Bamenda
  • Favourite subject: Physical Education (PE)
  • Hobbies: football and swimming
images: A student being interviewed by a classmate with a microphone in front of a school building.

questions.texte: Write 5 questions and their corresponding answers based on the information above.
questions.reponse: Example answers: Question 1: What is your name? Answer: My name is Michael. Question 2: How old are you? Answer: I am 11 years old. Question 3: Where are you from? Answer: I am from Bamenda. Question 4: What is your favourite subject? Answer: My favourite subject is Physical Education (PE). Question 5: What are your hobbies? Answer: My hobbies are football and swimming.
